plugin.label: WBM Product Type
WBM Produkttyp
plugin.author: WBM
plugin.description: Shopware 6 plugin that adds a dedicated product type model, admin UI, storefront filtering and Elasticsearch integration.
Shopware 6 Plugin, das ein dediziertes Produkttyp-Modell, Admin-UI, Storefront-Filterung und Elasticsearch-Integration hinzufügt.
